description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior features a mix of dark and light surfaces, with large windows and a prominent balcony or terrace on the upper floor. The front facade includes a recessed entryway, possibly with a small porch area and steps leading up to the main door. The house sits on a rectangular lot with a patterned ground surface, suggesting a paved driveway or walkway. Vegetation is visible near the entry, adding a touch of greenery to the otherwise minimalist design. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on horizontal and vertical planes.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a sleek, geometric design. The exterior combines dark and light surfaces with a prominent balcony and a recessed entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and a small area of greenery near the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid, dark wall with minimal window openings and the extension of the paved ground surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, upper balcony, and the overall boxy structure of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible balcony railing and a glimpse of the entry area, emphasizing the house's layered geometry.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and balcony openings
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with steps, small porch, and minimalistic door design
